package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpWriteheaderAfterWrite() string {
    ruleID := "http_writeheader_after_write"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that write the response body before calling WriteHeader(...)."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
